notes: Solid Space Invaders implementation with proper alien formation, shields, mystery ship, waves, and lives system; alien sprites are blocky but recognizable, and the game is fully playable with no apparent JS errors, though visual fidelity lacks the classic pixel-art charm and shield positions feel slightly off.
Excellent implementation with pixel-perfect destructible shields, authentic alien movement patterns, and solid game loop; drawing shields pixel-by-pixel is slightly unoptimized but works fine.

A solid and mostly complete Space Invaders clone with proper waves, shields, mystery ship, pause/restart, and no obvious runtime errors, but it is still not flawless due to simplified visuals and some non-classic gameplay behaviors.
